case_title: WALLACE, FRANK ALLAN CORTEZ VS LUNA, FELIPE (OWNER BOB`S LIQUOR STORE.)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, FELIPE (OWNER BOB`S LIQUOR STORE.) SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY WALLACE, FRANK ALLAN CORTEZ AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, FELIPE (OWNER BOB`S LIQUOR STORE.) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-01-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-17-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DOES NOT MAKE THESE PAYMENTS, PLTF WILL HAVE A JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. FOR $2,100.00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, FELIPE (OWNER BOB`S LIQUOR STORE.)
DEFT TO PAY PLTF $1500.00 ON SEPT. 1, 1998 AND $600.00 ON 9/10/98.IF DEFT. DOES, PLTF WILL DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. IF DEFT
